question: How do I create an email marketing campaign in Odoo?
expected_answer: Go to Email Marketing > Mailings > Create. Set subject, select recipients (mailing list or filtered records), design the email body using the drag-and-drop builder, configure A/B testing if desired, and click Send or Schedule.

question: How do I set up a mailing list?
expected_answer: Go to Email Marketing > Mailing Lists > Create. Name the list. Add contacts manually, import via CSV, or enable website newsletter signup. The system tracks bounce %, opt-out %, and blacklist %.

question: How do I set up A/B testing for email campaigns?
expected_answer: Enable A/B Testing on the mailing. Set the test percentage (e.g., 10% per variant), select winner criteria (manual, open rate, click rate, reply rate, leads, quotations, revenues), and set the schedule date. Odoo randomly splits recipients between variants, compares metrics after sending, and auto-selects/sends the winner via cron.

question: How does the Marketing Automation campaign engine work?
expected_answer: Create a campaign with a target model (contact, lead, etc.) and a domain filter. Add activities (email or server action) with trigger types: begin (immediate), activity (time-delayed after parent), or email event-based (open, click, reply, bounce, not_open, not_click, not_reply). Campaign syncs participants via 12h cron and executes activities via 1h cron.

question: What are the 6 pre-built Marketing Automation campaign templates?
expected_answer: 1) Tag Hot Contacts — welcome email + tag clickers. 2) Welcome Flow — welcome email + remove bounced. 3) Double Opt-in — confirm consent. 4) Commercial Prospection — catalog + follow-up. 5) Schedule Calls — schedule with salesperson. 6) Prioritize Hot Leads — email + assign high priority if opened.

question: How do I configure a Double Opt-in campaign for GDPR compliance?
expected_answer: Use the 'Double Opt-in' pre-built template. It sends a confirmation email to new recipients. When they click the confirmation link, they're added to the confirmed contacts mailing list. If they don't confirm, they're not added. This ensures explicit consent before marketing communications.

question: How does email link tracking work in Odoo?
expected_answer: When sending an email, all links are automatically converted to tracked short URLs via link_tracker._shorten_links(). The URL pattern is: /r/<short_code>/m/<mailing_trace_id>. When a recipient clicks, the system records the click with IP, country, and timestamp, then redirects to the original URL.

question: How do I handle email bounces in Odoo?
expected_answer: When an email bounces, mail.thread._routing_handle_bounce() sets the trace to 'bounced' with a failure type (mail_bounce, mail_spam, etc.). After 5 bounces within 3 months with >1 week between first and last, the email is auto-blacklisted. Blacklisted emails are excluded from all future mailings.

question: How do I create an SMS campaign?
expected_answer: Enable SMS Marketing. Go to SMS Marketing > Create. Select recipients, write the SMS body (character-limited), choose backend (IAP SMS or Twilio), and send. SMS marketing integrates with Marketing Automation for triggered SMS in campaign workflows.

question: How do I set up social media posting?
expected_answer: Install Social Marketing. Connect accounts: Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X/Twitter, YouTube under Configuration > Social Accounts. Create posts with text and media, schedule them individually or via social marketing campaigns. Monitor engagement via social streams.
